scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n gw,auth,portfolio,media,dash,web,admin -c cyan,yellow,green,magenta,blue,red,white "node --watch services/api/src/server.js" "node --watch services/auth-service/src/server.js" "node --watch services/portfolio-service/src/server.js" "node --watch services/media-service/src/server.js" "node --watch services/dashboard-service/src/server.js" "cd apps/web && npm run dev" "cd apps/admin && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -n gw,auth,portfolio,media,dash -c cyan,yellow,green,magenta,blue "node --watch services/api/src/server.js" "node --watch services/auth-service/src/server.js" "node --watch services/portfolio-service/src/server.js" "node --watch services/media-service/src/server.js" "node --watch services/dashboard-service/src/server.js"
